title: euphrasia tatarica var. ericetorum
intro: Euphrasia tatarica var. ericetorum, also known as Tatarian eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye infections and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Euphrasia tatarica var. ericetorum include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing irritated mucous membranes. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical or internal use, with some herbalists recommending it for its potential benefits in treating conjunctivitis and sinusitis.
